scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase leading-none
scale.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-zinc-500

rules: No generic sans for headings, must strictly use Outfit with tight tracking.
Labels and overlines must be extremely small, uppercase, with wide letter spacing.
Never center-align large paragraphs of text. Left align for structural tension.
Color is strictly for function. 95% of the UI must be black, white, and grey.
Use Signal Red (#FF3B30) exclusively for primary CTAs and interactive hover states.
Extreme whitespace: double standard padding between sections.
Use strict geometric grid layouts but with asymmetrical spans (e.g. 8-col and 4-col splits).

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-black/5
header.layout: flex justify-between items-center py-4 px-6 md:px-12

hero.content: Massive typography animating in. A stark minimalist visual layout.
hero.image_treatment: Abstract geometric image placed inside an asymmetrical bento box container, NOT full screen.

services_bento.card_style: bg-secondary border border-border/50 hover:border-black transition-colors duration-300 group rounded-none

contact_form.input_style: border-0 border-b border-zinc-300 bg-transparent rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus:ring-0 focus:border-black text-lg w-full transition-colors
contact_form.button: bg-black text-white px-8 py-4 hover:bg-accent hover:text-white transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold w-full md:w-auto

footer.massive_text: text-[12vw] leading-none font-black tracking-tighter col-span-full border-t border-white/20 pt-12 mt-12

motion.scroll: MANDATORY: Install and configure @studio-freight/react-lenis for premium smooth scroll physics.
animations: Framer Motion for entrance staggers on the hero typography.
Hover states: arrow icons on service cards translate slightly right and turn red on group-hover.
Parallax: Subtle y-axis translation on images during scroll.

images.instructions: Place in the right column or bento box of the hero section. Do not use as a full-screen blanket background.
Use for a visual break section or as a subdued background image for the 'Marketing' or 'Agency' info box.
Use in the Statistics section or About section to enforce the Swiss design structural feel.

media.icons: Use lucide-react with stroke-width 1.5 for a sharp, technical look.

testing.requirements: ALL interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs, submit buttons) MUST have a unique `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lucide-react`, `framer-motion`, `@studio-freight/react-lenis`, and Shadcn UI components (form, input, textarea).
Construct layout entirely with HTML/Tailwind; avoid Shadcn layout wrappers.
Ensure all fonts are imported properly in `index.css` via Google Fonts (`Outfit` and `Manrope`).
Use strict minimalist 'Swiss' styling: 1px borders, massive typography, heavy contrast, no rounded corners (rounded-none).
The Contact Form should be functional in UI with validation but look extremely minimalist (border-bottom only, no boxes).
Hero should be extremely impactful. Huge text: 'WE BUILD DIGITAL EXPERIENCES'.
Never guess images. Use ONLY the URLs provided in the media section.
